headline: Claude dominates developer discourse as Code plugin adoption accelerates
body: Claude has become the focal point of developer tooling conversations across major platforms, with 35 unique authors discussing implementation patterns, plugin capabilities, and integration challenges. The velocity and breadth of discussion signals rapid adoption of Claude Code alongside GitHub Copilot, marking a significant shift in how developers approach AI-assisted coding. For healthcare AI specifically, this matters because clinical software vendors and health system IT teams are watching these developer tool wars closely. As Claude Code matures and integrates deeper into workflows, healthcare organizations evaluating AI coding assistants for EHR customization, clinical decision support development, and healthcare data pipeline work need to assess real-world performance and reliability. The ecosystem discussion around Claude's strengths and limitations directly impacts vendor selection and build-versus-buy decisions for healthcare AI infrastructure.
